name: Iron Man
description: Anthony Edward Stark, genius inventor and CEO of Stark Industries, built the first Iron Man suit while held captive by terrorists. Powered by an arc reactor embedded in his chest, Stark became the armored Avenger and a founding member of the team that would defend Earth against threats from Loki to Thanos. His sacrifice wielding the Infinity Stones cemented his legacy as the heart of the MCU. Known for his wit, technological brilliance, and evolving moral compass, Stark redefined what it meant to be a hero without innate superpowers.
